particulars.description: 1. all that freehold property known as 9 circus road london NW8 6NX and registered under title number 225423. 2. all that freehold property known as 98 cochrane street and 5 and 7 circus road st marylebone NW8 6NX and registered under title number NGL652044. 3. all that leasehold property known as 5-9 circus road and 98 cochrane street london NW8 6NX and registered under title number NGL916951. 4. all that leasehold land known as entrance way to 5 circus road london NW8 6NX and registered under title number NGL920344.

Leasehold land 5-9 circus road and 98 cochrane street, london NW8 6NX. Leasehold entrance way 5 circus road, london NW8 6NX. Freehold land 9 circus road and freehold land 98 cochrane street and 5 and 7 circus road st marylebone NW8 6NX.
